name: Life360 Inc.
analysis: 360's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 57% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$23.1400. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$23.9000, stop A$20.5722, target A$27.0700 (0.95:1) — then trail it.
